name: encampment
identity: A rough human encampment situated in a harsh arctic environment, characterized by flickering bonfire light and figures draped in hides and furs.
current_status: Illuminated by a flickering bonfire, with several human figures milling about. Two robust captors are actively pushing the player character toward an older, commanding figure standing by the fire.

volatile_state.current_activity: illuminated by bonfire; captors moving player toward elder figure

notes: The specific name or affiliation of the encampment is not yet revealed.
